business.name: Carpenter WE TRUST
business.tagline: Master Carpentry for Dallas Homes & Businesses

seo.title: Best Carpenter in Dallas, TX | Custom Woodwork & Repairs | Carpenter WE TRUST
seo.description: Expert carpenter in Dallas, TX offering custom furniture, trim, cabinetry, and repairs. Premium craftsmanship, on-time service. Call (817) 951-4573 for a free quote.

hero.headline: Custom Woodwork That Transforms Your Space
hero.subheadline: From built-in shelves to intricate trim, we bring precision and artistry to every project. Your vision, our craftsmanship.

featureSections.title: Bespoke Furniture & Built-Ins
featureSections.body: Whether you need a custom dining table, a wall of built-in bookshelves, or a unique entertainment center, we design and build pieces that fit your style and space perfectly. Our team uses premium hardwoods and time-tested joinery techniques.
bullets: Custom designs tailored to your home
Solid wood construction with dovetail joinery
featureSections.cardBody: We start with a consultation to understand your needs, create detailed plans, then build and install with minimal disruption. Every piece is sanded, stained, and sealed to perfection.

featureSections.title: Expert Repairs & Wood Restoration
featureSections.body: Don't replace what can be repaired. Our carpenters skillfully restore damaged woodwork, fix squeaky floors, replace rotted trim, and breathe new life into old furniture. We match existing finishes seamlessly.
featureSections.cardBody: We use only the best materials and techniques. Our work is backed by a satisfaction guarantee, and we always clean up after ourselves. Your home is our workshop.

whyChooseUs.title: Master Craftsmanship
whyChooseUs.description: Every cut, joint, and finish is executed with precision. We take pride in work that lasts generations.

whyChooseUs.title: Reliable & On Time
whyChooseUs.description: We show up when promised and complete projects on schedule. Your time is valuable.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees. You get a detailed quote upfront, and we stick to it.

whyChooseUs.title: Eco-Friendly Practices
whyChooseUs.description: We source sustainable lumber and recycle wood waste. Beautiful work that's kind to the planet.

testimonials.quote: Our custom built-in bookshelf is the centerpiece of the living room. The craftsmanship is incredible and the team was so professional.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: They restored our 1920s wood windows perfectly. You can't even tell they were damaged. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: James T.

testimonials.quote: Fair price, excellent work, and they finished ahead of schedule. We're already planning our next project with them.
testimonials.author: Lisa R.

cta.headline: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subheadline: Call us today for a free, no-obligation consultation and quote.

servicesPage.intro: From custom furniture to full-home trim work, our carpenters bring decades of experience to every job. We specialize in residential and commercial carpentry in Dallas, TX.

services.title: Custom Furniture & Built-Ins
services.shortDescription: Design and build unique furniture and built-in cabinetry tailored to your space.
services.longDescription: Our custom furniture service covers everything from dining tables and bed frames to entertainment centers and home office desks. We work with you to design pieces that match your aesthetic and functional needs. Using solid hardwoods like oak, walnut, and maple, we construct each piece with traditional joinery for durability. Installation is handled by our team to ensure a perfect fit.
benefits: Unique, one-of-a-kind pieces for your home
Maximized use of awkward spaces with built-ins
Premium materials that last a lifetime

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We meet at your home to discuss your vision, take measurements, and review style preferences.

process.title: Design & Approval
process.description: We create detailed drawings and material samples. You approve the design before we start building.

process.title: Build & Install
process.description: Our craftsmen build your piece in our workshop, then install it on-site with care.

faqs.question: What types of wood do you use?
faqs.answer: We offer a variety of hardwoods including oak, walnut, cherry, maple, and more. We can also work with reclaimed wood for a rustic look.

faqs.question: How long does a custom piece take?
faqs.answer: Timeline depends on complexity. A simple table might take 2-3 weeks, while a full wall unit could take 6-8 weeks. We'll provide a timeline during consultation.

services.title: Trim & Crown Molding
services.shortDescription: Add elegance to any room with professional trim and crown molding installation.
services.longDescription: Crown molding, baseboards, chair rails, and wainscoting can transform a plain room into a showpiece. Our carpenters have extensive experience with intricate trim work, including coping inside corners for seamless joints. We work with MDF, solid wood, and polyurethane materials to match your budget and style.
benefits: Increased home value and curb appeal

process.title: Measurement & Material Selection
process.description: We measure your rooms and help you choose the right trim style and material.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our team installs the trim with precision, coping corners for a perfect fit.

process.title: Finishing
process.description: We caulk, sand, and paint or stain the trim to match your décor.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replicate most trim profiles. We'll take a sample or photos to ensure a perfect match.

faqs.question: How much does crown molding cost?
faqs.answer: Cost varies by material and room size. We provide free estimates. Contact us for a quote.

services.title: Cabinet Making & Refacing
services.shortDescription: Custom kitchen and bathroom cabinets, plus refacing to refresh your existing cabinets.
services.longDescription: Whether you need brand-new custom cabinets for a kitchen remodel or want to give your existing cabinets a facelift with refacing, we deliver exceptional results. Our cabinets feature dovetail drawers, soft-close hinges, and durable finishes. Refacing includes new doors, drawer fronts, and hardware, plus a fresh veneer on the cabinet boxes.
benefits: Custom sizes to fit any kitchen layout
Refacing saves up to 50% vs. new cabinets

process.title: Design & Layout
process.description: We work with you to design cabinet layouts that maximize storage and workflow.

process.title: Fabrication
process.description: Cabinets are built in our shop to exact specifications with premium materials.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our team installs cabinets and ensures everything is level, plumb, and functioning perfectly.

faqs.question: Do you offer soft-close drawers?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our cabinets come with soft-close hinges and drawer slides as standard.

faqs.question: How long does refacing take?
faqs.answer: Most kitchen refacing projects take 3-5 days. New cabinet installation may take longer depending on complexity.

services.title: Deck & Porch Construction
services.shortDescription: Build beautiful, durable decks and porches for outdoor living.
services.longDescription: Extend your living space outdoors with a custom deck or porch. We design and build structures using pressure-treated lumber, cedar, or composite materials. Our decks feature integrated seating, planters, and lighting options. We handle all permits and inspections to ensure safety and code compliance.
benefits: Custom design to match your home's architecture
Built to last with proper drainage and fasteners

process.title: Site Evaluation & Design
process.description: We assess your yard, discuss your needs, and create a design that fits your space and budget.

process.title: Permitting & Material Order
process.description: We obtain necessary permits and order materials. We'll keep you informed every step.

process.title: Construction
process.description: Our crew builds the deck with attention to detail, from footings to final stain.

faqs.question: Do you use composite decking?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer Trex and other composite brands for a maintenance-free option. We also work with traditional wood.

faqs.question: How long does a deck build take?
faqs.answer: A typical deck takes 1-2 weeks, depending on size and complexity. We'll provide a timeline in your estimate.

about.headline: Craftsmanship Rooted in Dallas
about.mission: Our mission is to deliver exceptional carpentry that enhances homes and businesses in Dallas, combining old-world skill with modern efficiency.
story: Carpenter WE TRUST was founded in 2010 by a team of master carpenters who wanted to bring quality woodwork back to the forefront. Starting with small furniture commissions, we quickly earned a reputation for precision and reliability. Over the years, we've grown into a full-service carpentry company serving residential and commercial clients across Dallas.

Every project we take on reflects our commitment to excellence. We invest in continuous training and use only the finest materials. From historic restorations in M Streets to modern builds in Uptown, our work stands the test of time. We believe that good carpentry is an art, and we treat every piece of wood with respect.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We are honest in our pricing, transparent in our process, and accountable for our work.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We never cut corners. Every joint, finish, and detail meets our high standards.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We respect your home, your time, and your vision. We clean up daily and communicate clearly.

coreValues.title: Innovation
coreValues.description: We stay current with tools, techniques, and materials to offer you the best solutions.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Quote Today
contact.subheadline: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
